title: polystichum trifoliatum
intro: Polystichum trifoliatum, also known as the three-lobed fern or trifoliate fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polystichum trifoliatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
